stemHtml: Which of these statements about an auto-brake system is correct?

options.a: When using manual braking during taxiing, the auto-brake system will disarm.
options.b: On most aeroplanes the auto-brake system provides a constant deceleration during landing on a dry runway (ignoring possible transition effects when the system begins to function).
options.c: When a low auto-brake setting is used during landing use of reverse will not influence the brake temperature.
options.d: When the auto-brake system is inoperative, in general take-off is not allowed, because maximum manual braking does not achieve the same deceleration as the auto-brake system in the RTO mode.
